title: johnstonella angelica
intro: Johnstonella angelica, also known as Angel's Trumpet, is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Johnstonella angelica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal disorders. Johnstonella angelica is often prepared as a tea or tincture by herbalists, who recommend it for its potential to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
